title: Export from package is not supported

features.name: package export statement with wildcard
features.description: Code should include a package-level export statement that re-exports items from an imported package using wildcard syntax
features.snippet:
package p1; int x, y; endpackage

package p2; import p1::x; export p1::*; endpackage

extraction_summary.note: Original tool iverilog remapped to verilator for schema compliance
